data.biography: Katja Rupé es una actriz y directora alemana.
Katja Rupé is a German stage and screen actress, writer and director. She was once a member of the progressive theater group La Mama in New York.
data.name: Katja Rupé

data.biography: Gabe Gabriel is a queer South African writer, director, and actor. As a writer, Gabe has penned commissioned works for production companies in Canada, the US, India and South Africa; as a director, Gabe helmed South Africa's first gay Rom Com for Showmax; and his original father-son road trip screenplay 'Runs in the Family' (developed with real-life father and long-time collaborator Ian Gabriel) marks Gabe's first professional acting role since he came out as transgender in 2019.
data.name: Gabe Gabriel

data.biography: Corinne Puget est une actrice, scénariste et metteur en scène française.
Praew Hassaya Isariyasereekul is a Thai and English-speaking emcee, radio DJ on Mellow 97.5, freelance actress and podcaster.
data.name: Hassaya Isariyasereekul
หัสสยา อิสริยะเสรีกุล

data.biography: Jiang Yingjun is a female voice actor from China. Originally belonged to Beidou Penguin Studio, now a member of Tengyun Culture.
data.name: Jiang Yingjun

data.biography:
姜英俊是中国内地的女性配音演员。

原所属北斗企鹅工作室，现藤韵文化成员。 声音柔和细腻，声线可御可萝莉，能模仿正太，能够完美演绎多种类型的角色配音。
data.name: 姜英俊

data.biography:
姜英俊是中國內地的女性配音演員。

原所屬北鬥企鵝工作室，現藤韻文化成員。

聲音柔和細膩，聲線可禦可蘿莉，能模仿正太，能夠完美演繹多種類型的角色配音。
data.name: 姜英俊

data.biography: Not be confused with Shang Luo (Zhao Shuang) / (伤洛（赵双）). Goes by the industry name Zhao Xiaoshuang (赵小双), she is a female voice actor from Mainland China especially known for playing eccentric roles.
data.name: Shuang Zhao

data.biography: 伤洛，原名赵双， 其声音以沉稳优美著称，情感丰富多变，代表角色有动画《记忆U盘》中的方小甜等
data.name: 赵双

data.biography: 趙雙（良二、趙小雙） 是中國內地的女性配音演員。聲線柔和細膩，青春洋溢，能夠演繹少女、女青年，尤其擅長古靈精怪的角色。代表作 《百妖譜》桃夭。
data.name: 趙雙

data.biography: 趙雙（良二、趙小雙 8）是中國內地的女性配音演員。聲線柔和細膩，青春洋溢，能夠演繹少女、女青年，尤其擅長古靈精怪的角色。代表作 《百妖譜》桃夭。
data.name: 趙雙
